quince-celery-lezzet.name: Quince Celery
instructions: 1. Peel the shell of the peninsula and the moon, and wait in the water with the iri chopstick n and lemon.
2. Crochet the peninsula with 2 cm thickness.
3.   Peel the shell of the sauce and roast the bar to pink in the form and olive oil.
4. Add Kereviz, moonva, kere stem and caviar and roast 3 minutes.
5. Add orange juice and hot water to your car.
6.  Add and cook until the jealous fire cover is off.
